citations.cited_text: RF Microneedling—Key Points LA’s Award-Winning RF Microneedling Specialists · Radiofrequency microneedling, or RF microneedling, is a dermatologic pro...

content.text: a dermatologic procedure that effectively corrects various skin problems

by combining two technologies: traditional microneedling and radiofrequency energy.

## How It Works

citations.cited_text: The microneedling device makes tiny wounds in the skin. Simultaneously, the tip of the needle releases radiofrequency waves into the wounds.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: The microneedling device makes tiny wounds in the skin. Simultaneously, the tip of the needle releases radiofrequency waves into the wounds.
More specifically,

citations.cited_text: Radio frequency (RF) microneedling devices use specially insulated needles that deliver high-intensity radio frequency energy into the targeted tissue...
citations.title: Radio Frequency (RF) Microneedling | Cleveland Clinic

citations.cited_text: This procedure gives a uniform warming effect to the deep tissue, which helps to stimulate new collagen fibers to grow (leading to significant improve...
citations.title: Radio Frequency (RF) Microneedling | Cleveland Clinic

content.text: radio frequency (RF) microneedling devices use specially insulated needles that deliver high-intensity radio frequency energy into the targeted tissue under your skin. This procedure gives a uniform warming effect to the deep tissue, which helps to stimulate new collagen fibers to grow (leading to significant improvement to skin quality and texture).

citations.cited_text: The technique combines the tissue-heating effect of radiowaves with the collagen-inducing ability of microneedling.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling Guide: Process, Benefits & Tips

content.text: The technique combines the tissue-heating effect of radiowaves with the collagen-inducing ability of microneedling.
The process creates

citations.cited_text: The procedure involves using tiny needles to create controlled micro-injuries in the skin. These micro-injuries trigger the body’s natural healing pro...
citations.title: RF Microneedling: Ultimate Skin Tightening Guide - Kristin Schmidt MD - Katy, TX

content.text: controlled micro-injuries in the skin. These micro-injuries trigger the body's natural healing process. As a result, new collagen and elastin form, strengthening the skin's structure.

## Treatment Process

Before the procedure,

citations.cited_text: They apply a topical anesthetic to the treatment area about 1 hour before the procedure.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: a topical anesthetic is applied to the treatment area about 1 hour before the procedure.

citations.cited_text: The procedure takes 10 to 20 minutes. The exact duration depends on what you’re treating.

content.text: The procedure takes 10 to 20 minutes. The exact duration depends on what you're treating.
## Benefits and Uses

citations.cited_text: According to research, radiofrequency microneedling is effective for many skin conditions.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: According to research, radiofrequency microneedling is effective for many skin conditions.

It can be used to treat:

- Acne scars:

citations.cited_text: ... 2014 study of 31 people, radiofrequency microneedling moderately improved acne scars in 58 percent of the participants.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: A 2014 study of 31 people found radiofrequency microneedling moderately improved acne scars in 58 percent of the participants.
- Wrinkles and aging signs:

citations.cited_text: In a 2013 study, for example, the procedure reduced wrinkles around the eyes. The effects lasted longer than Botox injections.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: In a 2013 study, the procedure reduced wrinkles around the eyes. The effects lasted longer than Botox injections.
- Skin tightening:

citations.cited_text: A 2020 case report also shares that the treatment can reduce loose facial skin.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: A 2020 case report also shares that the treatment can reduce loose facial skin.
- Excessive sweating:

citations.cited_text: According to a 2019 study, the procedure can permanently treat hyperhidrosis, or excessive sweating.
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: Procedure, Aftercare, Side Effects, Cost

content.text: According to a 2019 study, the procedure can permanently treat hyperhidrosis, or excessive sweating.
## Recovery and Results

citations.cited_text: Side effects following RF microneedling are mild, resulting in minimal downtime after treatment.
citations.title: Radio Frequency (RF) Microneedling | Cleveland Clinic

citations.cited_text: Typically, your skin is mildly red for around 24 hours. Most people can resume their normal routine within a day.
citations.title: Radio Frequency (RF) Microneedling | Cleveland Clinic

content.text: Side effects following RF microneedling are mild, resulting in minimal downtime after treatment. Typically, your skin is mildly red for around 24 hours. Most people can resume their normal routine within a day.

citations.cited_text: Conclusion: Radiofrequency microneedling is an effective intervention that can be used repeatedly and safely in combination with other treatment modal...
citations.title: Radiofrequency Microneedling: A Comprehensive and Critical Review - PubMed

content.text: Radiofrequency microneedling is an effective intervention that can be used repeatedly and safely in combination with other treatment modalities and in individuals with darker skin phototypes. Radiofrequency microneedling-induced dermal remodeling and neocollagenesis are slow and progressive but continue to improve even 6 months after treatment.

citations.cited_text: Results · Best results are typically achieved after three to six months from the first treatment (your skin continues to improve as the new collagen i...
citations.title: Radio Frequency (RF) Microneedling | Cleveland Clinic

content.text: Best results are typically achieved after three to six months from the first treatment (your skin continues to improve as the new collagen is produced). Based on your consultation, your physician will recommend a treatment plan (most patients receive two to three treatments).
The treatment is considered safe for most skin types and offers an alternative to more invasive procedures while providing significant skin rejuvenation benefits.
